   119→@Composable
   120→private fun BottomFloatingActionButton(
   121→    connectionState: State<Boolean>,
   122→    applicationSelected: State<String>,
   123→    pickAppActivityLauncher: ManagedActivityResultLauncher<Intent, ActivityResult>,
   124→        snackbarHostState: SnackbarHostState
   125→) {
   126→    val mContext = LocalContext.current
   127→    val scope = rememberCoroutineScope()
   128→
   129→    fun connectVPN() {
   130→        val intent = Intent(AppService.ACTION_START)
   131→        intent.setPackage(mContext.packageName)
   132→        mContext.startForegroundService(intent)
   133→
   134→        scope.launch {
   135→                        val result = snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(
   136→                                message = mContext.getString(R.string.mitm_connected),
   137→                                actionLabel = mContext.getString(R.string.mitm_connected_launch),
   138→                                duration = SnackbarDuration.Short
   139→                        )
   140→                        if (result == SnackbarResult.ActionPerformed) {
   141→                                val intent1 = mContext.packageManager.getLaunchIntentForPackage(applicationSelected.value)
   142→                                mContext.startActivity(intent1)
   143→                        }
   144→        }
   145→    }
   146→
   147→        fun disconnectVPN() {
   148→                val intent = Intent(AppService.ACTION_STOP)
   149→                intent.setPackage(mContext.packageName)
   150→                mContext.startForegroundService(intent)
   151→
   152→                scope.launch {
   153→                        snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(
   154→                                message = mContext.getString(R.string.mitm_disconnected),
   155→                                duration = SnackbarDuration.Short
   156→                        )
   157→                }
   158→        }
   159→
   160→    val vpnRequestLauncher = rememberLauncherForActivityResult(ActivityResultContracts.StartActivityForResult()) {
   161→        if (it.resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
   162→            connectVPN()
   163→        }
   164→    }
   165→    fun checkVPN() {
   166→        val intent = VpnService.prepare(mContext)
   167→        if (intent != null) {
   168→            vpnRequestLauncher.launch(intent)
   169→        } else {
   170→            connectVPN()
   171→        }
   172→    }
   173→    val overlayRequestLauncher = rememberLauncherForActivityResult(ActivityResultContracts.StartActivityForResult()) {
   174→                if (Settings.canDrawOverlays(mContext)) {
   175→            checkVPN()
   176→        }
   177→    }
   178→
   179→        ExtendedFloatingActionButton(
   180→                onClick = {
   181→                        if (AppService.isActive) {
   182→                                disconnectVPN()
   183→                        } else if (applicationSelected.value.isEmpty()){
   184→                                scope.launch {
   185→                                        val result = snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(
   186→                                                message = mContext.getString(R.string.dashboard_no_application),
   187→                                                actionLabel = mContext.getString(R.string.dashboard_select_application),
   188→                                                duration = SnackbarDuration.Short
   189→                                        )
   190→                                        if (result == SnackbarResult.ActionPerformed) {
   191→                                                pickAppActivityLauncher.launch(Intent(mContext, AppPickerActivity::class.java))
   192→                                        }
   193→                                }
   194→                        } else {
   195→                                if (!Settings.canDrawOverlays(mContext)) {
   196→                                        mContext.toast(R.string.request_overlay)
   197→                                        overlayRequestLauncher.launch(Intent(Settings.ACTION_MANAGE_OVERLAY_PERMISSION))
   198→                                } else {
   199→                                        checkVPN()
   200→                                }
   201→                        }
   202→                },
   203→                elevation = FloatingActionButtonDefaults.elevation(0.dp, 0.dp, 0.dp, 0.dp),
   204→                containerColor = if (connectionState.value) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.tertiaryContainer else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer,
   205→                contentColor = if (connectionState.value) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onTertiaryContainer else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer
   206→        ) {
   207→                Icon(
   208→                        painter = painterResource(id = R.drawable.notification_icon),
   209→                        contentDescription = stringResource(id = if (connectionState.value) R.string.dashboard_fab_disconnect else R.string.dashboard_fab_connect),
   210→                )
   211→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.size(8.dp, 0.dp))
   212→                Text(
   213→                        text = stringResource(id = if (connectionState.value) R.string.dashboard_fab_disconnect else R.string.dashboard_fab_connect),
   214→                        textAlign = TextAlign.Center
   215→                )
   216→        }
   217→}

    30→@Composable
    31→fun PHaxApp(
    32→    windowSize: WindowSizeClass,
    33→    displayFeatures: List<DisplayFeature>
    34→) {
    35→    /**
    36→     * This will help us select type of navigation and content type depending on window size and
    37→     * fold state of the device.
    38→     */
    39→    val navigationType: NavigationType
    40→
    41→    /**
    42→     * We are using display's folding features to map the device postures a fold is in.
    43→     * In the state of folding device If it's half fold in BookPosture we want to avoid content
    44→     * at the crease/hinge
    45→     */
    46→    val foldingFeature = displayFeatures.filterIsInstance<FoldingFeature>().firstOrNull()
    47→
    48→    val foldingDevicePosture = when {
    49→        isBookPosture(foldingFeature) ->
    50→            DevicePosture.BookPosture(foldingFeature.bounds)
    51→
    52→        isSeparating(foldingFeature) ->
    53→            DevicePosture.Separating(foldingFeature.bounds, foldingFeature.orientation)
    54→
    55→        else -> DevicePosture.NormalPosture
    56→    }
    57→
    58→    when (windowSize.widthSizeClass) {
    59→        WindowWidthSizeClass.Compact -> {
    60→            navigationType = NavigationType.BOTTOM_NAVIGATION
    61→        }
    62→        WindowWidthSizeClass.Medium -> {
    63→            navigationType = NavigationType.NAVIGATION_RAIL
    64→        }
    65→        WindowWidthSizeClass.Expanded -> {
    66→            navigationType = if (foldingDevicePosture is DevicePosture.BookPosture) {
    67→                NavigationType.NAVIGATION_RAIL
    68→            } else {
    69→                NavigationType.PERMANENT_NAVIGATION_DRAWER
    70→            }
    71→        }
    72→        else -> {
    73→            navigationType = NavigationType.BOTTOM_NAVIGATION
    74→        }
    75→    }
    76→
    77→    /**
    78→     * Content inside Navigation Rail/Drawer can also be positioned at top, bottom or center for
    79→     * ergonomics and reachability depending upon the height of the device.
    80→     */
    81→    val navigationContentPosition = when (windowSize.heightSizeClass) {
    82→        WindowHeightSizeClass.Compact -> {
    83→            NavigationContentPosition.TOP
    84→        }
    85→        WindowHeightSizeClass.Medium,
    86→        WindowHeightSizeClass.Expanded -> {
    87→            NavigationContentPosition.CENTER
    88→        }
    89→        else -> {
    90→            NavigationContentPosition.TOP
    91→        }
    92→    }
    93→
    94→    PHaxNavigationWrapper(
    95→        navigationType = navigationType,
    96→        navigationContentPosition = navigationContentPosition
    97→    )
    98→}
    99→
   100→@OptIn(ExperimentalAnimationApi::class, ExperimentalCoroutinesApi::class)
   101→@Composable
   102→private fun PHaxNavigationWrapper(
   103→    navigationType: NavigationType,
   104→    navigationContentPosition: NavigationContentPosition
   105→) {
   106→    val drawerState = rememberDrawerState(initialValue = DrawerValue.Closed)
   107→    val scope = rememberCoroutineScope()
   108→
   109→    val navController = rememberAnimatedNavController()
   110→    val navigationActions = remember(navController) {
   111→        PHaxNavigationActions(navController)
   112→    }
   113→    val navBackStackEntry by navController.currentBackStackEntryAsState()
   114→    val selectedDestination =
   115→        navBackStackEntry?.destination?.route ?: PHaxRoute.DASHBOARD
   116→    val connectionState = connectionState()
   117→
   118→    if (navigationType == NavigationType.PERMANENT_NAVIGATION_DRAWER) {
   119→        PermanentNavigationDrawer(drawerContent = {
   120→            PermanentNavigationDrawerContent(
   121→                selectedDestination = selectedDestination,
   122→                navigationContentPosition = navigationContentPosition,
   123→                navigateToTopLevelDestination = navigationActions::navigateTo
   124→            )
   125→        }) {
   126→            PHaxAppContent(
   127→                navigationType = navigationType,
   128→                navigationContentPosition = navigationContentPosition,
   129→                navController = navController,
   130→                selectedDestination = selectedDestination,
   131→                navigateToTopLevelDestination = navigationActions::navigateTo,
   132→                connectionState = connectionState
   133→            )
   134→        }
   135→    } else if (navigationType != NavigationType.BOTTOM_NAVIGATION) {
   136→        ModalNavigationDrawer(
   137→            drawerContent = {
   138→                ModalNavigationDrawerContent(
   139→                    selectedDestination = selectedDestination,
   140→                    navigationContentPosition = navigationContentPosition,
   141→                    navigateToTopLevelDestination = navigationActions::navigateTo,
   142→                    onDrawerClicked = {
   143→                        scope.launch {
   144→                            drawerState.close()
   145→                        }
   146→                    }
   147→                )
   148→            },
   149→            drawerState = drawerState
   150→        ) {
   151→            PHaxAppContent(
   152→                navigationType = navigationType,
   153→                navigationContentPosition = navigationContentPosition,
   154→                navController = navController,
   155→                selectedDestination = selectedDestination,
   156→                navigateToTopLevelDestination = navigationActions::navigateTo,
   157→                connectionState = connectionState
   158→            ) {
   159→                scope.launch {
   160→                    drawerState.open()
   161→                }
   162→            }
   163→        }
   164→    } else {
   165→        PHaxAppContent(
   166→            navigationType = navigationType,
   167→            navigationContentPosition = navigationContentPosition,
   168→            navController = navController,
   169→            selectedDestination = selectedDestination,
   170→            navigateToTopLevelDestination = navigationActions::navigateTo,
   171→            connectionState = connectionState
   172→        ) {
   173→            scope.launch {
   174→                drawerState.open()
   175→            }
   176→        }
   177→    }
   178→}
   179→
   180→@Composable
   181→fun PHaxAppContent(
   182→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
   183→    navigationType: NavigationType,
   184→    navigationContentPosition: NavigationContentPosition,
   185→    navController: NavHostController,
   186→    selectedDestination: String,
   187→    navigateToTopLevelDestination: (PHaxTopLevelDestination) -> Unit,
   188→    connectionState: State<Boolean>,
   189→    onDrawerClicked: () -> Unit = {}
   190→) {
   191→    Row(modifier = modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
   192→        AnimatedVisibility(visible = navigationType == NavigationType.NAVIGATION_RAIL) {
   193→            PHaxNavigationRail(
   194→                selectedDestination = selectedDestination,
   195→                navigationContentPosition = navigationContentPosition,
   196→                navigateToTopLevelDestination = navigateToTopLevelDestination,
   197→                onDrawerClicked = onDrawerClicked
   198→            )
   199→        }
   200→        Column(
   201→            modifier = Modifier
   202→                .fillMaxSize()
   203→                .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.inverseOnSurface)
   204→        ) {
   205→            PHaxNavHost(
   206→                navController = navController,
   207→                navigationType = navigationType,
   208→                modifier = Modifier
   209→                    .weight(1f)
   210→                    .background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background),
   211→                connectionState = connectionState,
   212→                navigateToTopLevelDestination = navigateToTopLevelDestination
   213→            )
   214→            AnimatedVisibility(visible = navigationType == NavigationType.BOTTOM_NAVIGATION) {
   215→                PHaxBottomNavigationBar(
   216→                    selectedDestination = selectedDestination,
   217→                    navigateToTopLevelDestination = navigateToTopLevelDestination
   218→                )
   219→            }
   220→        }
   221→    }
   222→}
   223→
   224→@OptIn(ExperimentalAnimationApi::class)
   225→@Composable
   226→private fun PHaxNavHost(
   227→    navController: NavHostController,
   228→    navigationType: NavigationType,
   229→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
   230→    connectionState: State<Boolean>,
   231→    navigateToTopLevelDestination: (PHaxTopLevelDestination) -> Unit
   232→) {
   233→    AnimatedNavHost(
   234→        modifier = modifier,
   235→        navController = navController,
   236→        startDestination = PHaxRoute.DASHBOARD,
   237→        enterTransition = {
   238→            scaleIn(initialScale = 0.8f) + fadeIn()
   239→        },
   240→        exitTransition = {
   241→            fadeOut()
   242→        },
   243→    ) {
   244→        composable(PHaxRoute.DASHBOARD) {
   245→            DashboardScreen(navigationType, connectionState, navigateToTopLevelDestination)
   246→        }
   247→        composable(PHaxRoute.CONFIG) {
   248→            ConfigScreen(navigationType)
   249→        }
   250→        composable(PHaxRoute.ACCOUNTS) {
   251→            AccountsScreen(navigationType)
   252→        }
   253→        composable(PHaxRoute.SETTINGS) {
   254→            SettingsScreen(navigationType)
   255→        }
   256→    }
   257→}

    39→                WindowCompat.getInsetsController(window, view).isAppearanceLightStatusBars = !darkTheme

    39→        if (notificationManager.getNotificationChannel(CHANNEL_ID) == null) {

    57→    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {
    58→        intent ?: return START_NOT_STICKY
    59→
    60→        val action = intent.action
    61→        try {
    62→            if (ACTION_START == action) {
    63→                startVPN()
    64→                startForeground(1, createNotification())
    65→            } else {
    66→                stopVPN()
    67→                stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
    68→                stopSelf()
    69→            }
    70→        } catch (t: Throwable) {
    71→            logError("command", t)
    72→        }
    73→        return super.onStartCommand(intent, flags, startId)
    74→    }
    75→
    76→    private fun startVPN() {
    77→        val (hasIPv4, hasIPv6) = when(Settings.ipv6Status.getValue(this)) {
    78→                        Settings.IPv6Choices.AUTOMATIC -> checkNetState()
    79→                        Settings.IPv6Choices.ENABLED -> true to true
    80→                        Settings.IPv6Choices.DISABLED -> true to false
    81→                        Settings.IPv6Choices.V6ONLY -> false to true
    82→                }
    83→
    84→        val builder = Builder()
    85→        builder.setBlocking(true)
    86→        builder.setMtu(VPN_MTU)
    87→        builder.setSession("ProtoHax")
    88→        builder.addAllowedApplication(MainActivity.targetPackage)
    89→        builder.addDnsServer("8.8.8.8")
    90→        // ipv4
    91→        if (hasIPv4) {
    92→            builder.addAddress(PRIVATE_VLAN4_CLIENT, 30)
    93→            builder.addRoute("0.0.0.0", 0)
    94→        }
    95→        // ipv6
    96→        if (hasIPv6) {
    97→            builder.addAddress(PRIVATE_VLAN6_CLIENT, 126)
    98→            builder.addRoute("::", 0)
    99→        }
   100→
   101→        val vpnDescriptor = builder.establish() ?: return
   102→        this.vpnDescriptor = vpnDescriptor
   103→
   104→        val tun = TUN().apply {
   105→            fileDescriber = vpnDescriptor.fd
   106→            mtu = VPN_MTU
   107→            iPv6Config = when {
   108→                hasIPv4 && hasIPv6 -> Libmitm.IPv6Enable
   109→                hasIPv4 -> Libmitm.IPv6Disable
   110→                hasIPv6 -> Libmitm.IPv6Only
   111→                else -> error("invalid state")
   112→            }
   113→        }
   114→        this.tun = tun
   115→        tun.start()
   116→        logInfo("netstack started")
   117→        isActive = true
   118→        try {
   119→                        MinecraftRelay.announceRelayUp()
   120→            serviceListeners.forEach { it.onServiceStarted() }
   121→        } catch (t: Throwable) {
   122→            logError("start callback", t)
   123→        }
   124→    }
   125→
   126→    private fun stopVPN() {
   127→        isActive = false
   128→                vpnDescriptor?.close()
   129→                tun?.let {
   130→                        try {
   131→                                serviceListeners.forEach { l -> l.onServiceStopped() }
   132→                        } catch (t: Throwable) {
   133→                                logError("stop callback", t)
   134→                        }
   135→                        Thread(it::close).start()
   136→                }
   137→    }
   138→
   139→    private fun checkNetState(): Pair<Boolean, Boolean> {
   140→                val connectivityManager = this.getSystemService(CONNECTIVITY_SERVICE) as ConnectivityManager
   141→                val activeNetwork = connectivityManager.getLinkProperties(connectivityManager.activeNetwork ?: return true to false) ?: return true to false
   142→                val interfaceName = activeNetwork.interfaceName
   143→
   144→                val networkInterfaces = NetworkInterface.getNetworkInterfaces()
   145→                while (networkInterfaces.hasMoreElements()) {
   146→                        val ni = networkInterfaces.nextElement()
   147→                        if (ni.name != interfaceName) continue
   148→
   149→                        var hasIPv4 = false
   150→                        var hasIPv6 = false
   151→                        for (addr in ni.interfaceAddresses) {
   152→                                if (addr.address is Inet6Address) {
   153→                                        hasIPv6 = true
   154→                                } else if (addr.address is Inet4Address) {
   155→                                        hasIPv4 = true
   156→                                }
   157→                        }
   158→                        return hasIPv4 to hasIPv6
   159→                }
   160→
   161→                return true to false
   162→    }
   163→
   164→    private fun createNotification(): Notification {
   165→        val flag = PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE or PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT
   166→
   167→        val intent = Intent(this, MainActivity::class.java)
   168→        intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_LAUNCHER)
   169→        intent.action = Intent.ACTION_MAIN
   170→        val pendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(this, 0, intent, flag)
   171→
   172→        val stopIntent = Intent(ACTION_STOP)
   173→        stopIntent.setPackage(packageName)
   174→        val pendingIntent1 = PendingIntent.getForegroundService(this, 1, stopIntent, flag)
   175→
   176→        val builder = NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)
   177→            .setContentTitle(getString(R.string.app_name))
   178→            .setContentText(getString(
   179→                R.string.proxy_notification, getString(R.string.app_name), packageManager.getApplicationName(MainActivity.targetPackage)))
   180→            .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.notification_icon)
   181→            .setLargeIcon(BitmapFactory.decodeResource(resources, R.mipmap.ic_launcher))
   182→            .setOngoing(true)
   183→            .setContentIntent(pendingIntent)
   184→                        .addAction(R.drawable.notification_icon, getString(R.string.dashboard_fab_disconnect), pendingIntent1)
   185→
   186→        return builder.build()
   187→    }
   188→
   189→    companion object {
   190→        const val ACTION_START = "dev.sora.libmitm.vpn.start"
   191→        const val ACTION_STOP = "dev.sora.libmitm.vpn.stop"
   192→        const val CHANNEL_ID = "dev.sora.protohax.NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_ID"
   193→
   194→        const val VPN_MTU = 1500
   195→        const val PRIVATE_VLAN4_CLIENT = "10.13.37.1"
   196→        const val PRIVATE_VLAN6_CLIENT = "1337::1"
   197→
   198→        var isActive = false
   199→        private val serviceListeners = mutableSetOf<ServiceListener>()
   200→
   201→        fun addListener(listener: ServiceListener) {
   202→            serviceListeners.add(listener)
   203→        }
   204→
   205→        fun removeListener(listener: ServiceListener) {
   206→            serviceListeners.remove(listener)
   207→        }
   208→    }
   209→}

    48→    navigateToTopLevelDestination: (PHaxTopLevelDestination) -> Unit,

    50→) {

    62→                ) {

    70→                            )

    72→                    )

    75→                }
    76→
    77→                Column(

    79→                    horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,

    81→                ) {

    83→                        NavigationRailItem(

    96→                            },
    97→                            alwaysShowLabel = false
    98→                        )
    99→                    }
   100→                }
   101→            },
   102→            measurePolicy = { measurables, constraints ->
   103→                lateinit var headerMeasurable: Measurable
   104→                lateinit var contentMeasurable: Measurable
   105→                measurables.forEach {
   106→                    when (it.layoutId) {
   107→                        LayoutType.HEADER -> headerMeasurable = it
   108→                        LayoutType.CONTENT -> contentMeasurable = it
   109→                        else -> error("Unknown layoutId encountered!")
   110→                    }
   111→                }
   112→
   113→                val headerPlaceable = headerMeasurable.measure(constraints)
   114→                val contentPlaceable = contentMeasurable.measure(
   115→                    constraints.offset(vertical = -headerPlaceable.height)
   116→                )
   117→                layout(constraints.maxWidth, constraints.maxHeight) {
   118→                    // Place the header, this goes at the top
   119→                    headerPlaceable.placeRelative(0, 0)
   120→
   121→                    // Determine how much space is not taken up by the content
   122→                    val nonContentVerticalSpace = constraints.maxHeight - contentPlaceable.height
   123→
   124→                    val contentPlaceableY = when (navigationContentPosition) {
   125→                        // Figure out the place we want to place the content, with respect to the
   126→                        // parent (ignoring the header for now)
   127→                        NavigationContentPosition.TOP -> 0
   128→                        NavigationContentPosition.CENTER -> nonContentVerticalSpace / 2
   129→                    }
   130→                        // And finally, make sure we don't overlap with the header.
   131→                        .coerceAtLeast(headerPlaceable.height)
   132→
   133→                    contentPlaceable.placeRelative(0, contentPlaceableY)
   134→                }
   135→            }
   136→        )
   137→    }
   138→}

   321→                            },
   322→                            colors = NavigationDrawerItemDefaults.colors(
   323→                                unselectedContainerColor = Color.Transparent
   324→                            ),
   325→                            onClick = { navigateToTopLevelDestination(destination) }
   326→                        )
   327→                    }
   328→                }
   329→            },
   330→            measurePolicy = { measurables, constraints ->
   331→                lateinit var headerMeasurable: Measurable
   332→                lateinit var contentMeasurable: Measurable
   333→                measurables.forEach {
   334→                    when (it.layoutId) {
   335→                        LayoutType.HEADER -> headerMeasurable = it
   336→                        LayoutType.CONTENT -> contentMeasurable = it
   337→                        else -> error("Unknown layoutId encountered!")
   338→                    }
   339→                }
   340→
   341→                val headerPlaceable = headerMeasurable.measure(constraints)
   342→                val contentPlaceable = contentMeasurable.measure(
   343→                    constraints.offset(vertical = -headerPlaceable.height)
   344→                )
   345→                layout(constraints.maxWidth, constraints.maxHeight) {
   346→                    // Place the header, this goes at the top
   347→                    headerPlaceable.placeRelative(0, 0)
   348→
   349→                    // Determine how much space is not taken up by the content
   350→                    val nonContentVerticalSpace = constraints.maxHeight - contentPlaceable.height
   351→
   352→                    val contentPlaceableY = when (navigationContentPosition) {
   353→                        // Figure out the place we want to place the content, with respect to the
   354→                        // parent (ignoring the header for now)
   355→                        NavigationContentPosition.TOP -> 0
   356→                        NavigationContentPosition.CENTER -> nonContentVerticalSpace / 2
   357→                    }
   358→                        // And finally, make sure we don't overlap with the header.
   359→                        .coerceAtLeast(headerPlaceable.height)
   360→
   361→                    contentPlaceable.placeRelative(0, contentPlaceableY)
   362→                }
   363→            }
   364→        )
   365→    }
   366→}
   367→
   368→enum class LayoutType {
   369→    HEADER, CONTENT
   370→}
   371→

     1→package dev.sora.protohax.util
     2→
     3→
     4→import android.graphics.Rect
     5→import androidx.window.layout.FoldingFeature
     6→import kotlin.contracts.ExperimentalContracts
     7→import kotlin.contracts.contract
     8→
     9→/**
    10→ * Information about the posture of the device
    11→ */
    12→sealed interface DevicePosture {
    13→    object NormalPosture : DevicePosture
    14→
    15→    data class BookPosture(
    16→        val hingePosition: Rect
    17→    ) : DevicePosture
    18→
    19→    data class Separating(
    20→        val hingePosition: Rect,
    21→        var orientation: FoldingFeature.Orientation
    22→    ) : DevicePosture
    23→}
    24→
    25→@OptIn(ExperimentalContracts::class)
    26→fun isBookPosture(foldFeature: FoldingFeature?): Boolean {
    27→    contract { returns(true) implies (foldFeature != null) }
    28→    return foldFeature?.state == FoldingFeature.State.HALF_OPENED &&
    29→            foldFeature.orientation == FoldingFeature.Orientation.VERTICAL
    30→}
    31→
    32→@OptIn(ExperimentalContracts::class)
    33→fun isSeparating(foldFeature: FoldingFeature?): Boolean {
    34→    contract { returns(true) implies (foldFeature != null) }
    35→    return foldFeature?.state == FoldingFeature.State.FLAT && foldFeature.isSeparating
    36→}

    21→    const val ACCOUNTS = "Accounts"
    22→    const val SETTINGS = "Settings"
    23→

    27→
    28→data class PHaxTopLevelDestination(
    29→    val route: String,
    30→    val selectedIcon: ImageVector,
    31→    val unselectedIcon: ImageVector,
    32→    val iconTextId: Int
    33→)
    34→
    35→class PHaxNavigationActions(private val navController: NavHostController) {
    36→
    37→    fun navigateTo(destination: PHaxTopLevelDestination) {
    38→        navController.navigate(destination.route) {
    39→            // Pop up to the start destination of the graph to
    40→            // avoid building up a large stack of destinations
    41→            // on the back stack as users select items
    42→            popUpTo(navController.graph.findStartDestination().id) {
    43→                saveState = true
    44→            }
    45→            // Avoid multiple copies of the same destination when
    46→            // reselecting the same item
    47→            launchSingleTop = true
    48→            // Restore state when reselecting a previously selected item
    49→            restoreState = true
    50→        }
    51→    }
    52→}

   124→        fun View.draggable(params: WindowManager.LayoutParams, windowManager: WindowManager) {
   125→                var dragPosX = 0f
   126→                var dragPosY = 0f
   127→                var dragging = false
   128→                var pressDownTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   129→                setOnTouchListener { v, event ->
   130→                        when (event.action) {
   131→                                MotionEvent.ACTION_DOWN -> {
   132→                                        dragPosX = event.rawX
   133→                                        dragPosY = event.rawY
   134→                                        pressDownTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   135→                                        dragging = false
   136→                                        true
   137→                                }
   138→                                MotionEvent.ACTION_UP -> {
   139→                                        if (System.currentTimeMillis() - pressDownTime < 500) {
   140→                                                v.performClick()
   141→                                        }
   142→                                        true
   143→                                }
   144→                                MotionEvent.ACTION_MOVE -> {
   145→                                        if (dragging || System.currentTimeMillis() - pressDownTime > 500) {
   146→                                                params.x += (event.rawX - dragPosX).toInt()
   147→                                                params.y += (event.rawY - dragPosY).toInt()
   148→                                                dragPosX = event.rawX
   149→                                                dragPosY = event.rawY
   150→                                                windowManager.updateViewLayout(this, params)
   151→                                                true
   152→                                        } else {
   153→                                                if (abs(dragPosX - event.rawX) > 100 || abs(dragPosY - event.rawY) > 100) {
   154→                                                        dragging = true
   155→                                                }
   156→                                                false
   157→                                        }
   158→                                }
   159→                                else -> false
   160→                        }
   161→                }
   162→        }
   163→}

   217→        private fun NavHostController.safeNavigate(dst: String) {
   218→                navigate(dst) {
   219→                        // Pop up to the start destination of the graph to
   220→                        // avoid building up a large stack of destinations
   221→                        // on the back stack as users select items
   222→                        popUpTo(graph.findStartDestination().id) {
   223→                                saveState = true
   224→                        }
   225→                        // Avoid multiple copies of the same destination when
   226→                        // reselecting the same item
   227→                        launchSingleTop = true
   228→                        // Restore state when reselecting a previously selected item
   229→                        restoreState = true
   230→                }
   231→        }

   311→        @ExperimentalCoroutinesApi
   312→        @Composable
   313→        private fun moduleState(): SnapshotStateMap<CheatModule, Boolean> {
   314→                val stateMap = remember { mutableStateMapOf<CheatModule, Boolean>() }
   315→
   316→                LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
   317→                        callbackFlow {
   318→                                val listener = EventHook(EventModuleToggle::class.java, handler = {
   319→                                        trySend(this)
   320→                                })
   321→
   322→                                MinecraftRelay.session.eventManager.register(listener)
   323→
   324→                                MinecraftRelay.moduleManager.modules.forEach { module ->
   325→                                        stateMap[module] = module.state
   326→                                }
   327→
   328→                                // Remove callback when not used
   329→                                awaitClose {
   330→                                        MinecraftRelay.session.eventManager.removeHandler(listener)
   331→                                }
   332→                        }.collect {
   333→                                if (it.module.canToggle) {
   334→                                        stateMap[it.module] = it.targetState
   335→                                }
   336→                        }
   337→                }
   338→
   339→                return stateMap
   340→        }

   342→        @ExperimentalCoroutinesApi
   343→        @Composable
   344→        private fun displayState(wm: WindowManager, params: WindowManager.LayoutParams): State<Boolean> {
   345→                // Creates a State<ConnectionState> with current connectivity state as initial value
   346→                return produceState(initialValue = visibility) {
   347→                        // In a coroutine, can make suspend calls
   348→                        observeStateAsFlow().collect {
   349→                                value = it
   350→                                menuLayout?.let { l ->
   351→                                        params.flags = WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_DIM_BEHIND
   352→                                        if (Settings.trustClicks.getValue(overlayManager.ctx)) {
   353→                                                if (!it) {
   354→                                                        params.flags = WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_FOCUSABLE or WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_TOUCHABLE
   355→                                                }
   356→                                                l.isInvisible = false
   357→                                        } else {
   358→                                                if (!it) {
   359→                                                        params.flags = params.flags or WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_FOCUSABLE
   360→                                                }
   361→                                                l.isInvisible = !it
   362→                                        }
   363→                                        wm.updateViewLayout(l, params)
   364→                                }
   365→                                overlayManager.toggleRenderLayerViewVisibility(!it)
   366→                        }
   367→                }
   368→        }
   369→
   370→        @ExperimentalCoroutinesApi
   371→        private fun observeStateAsFlow() = callbackFlow {
   372→                val listener: (Boolean) -> Unit = {
   373→                        trySend(it)
   374→                }
   375→                listeners.add(listener)
   376→
   377→                // Set current state
   378→                trySend(visibility)
   379→
   380→                // Remove callback when not used
   381→                awaitClose {
   382→                        listeners.remove(listener)
   383→                }
   384→        }
   385→}

     3→import android.content.Context

    10→import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
    11→import androidx.compose.runtime.remember
    12→import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
    13→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    14→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
    15→import androidx.compose.ui.res.stringResource
    16→import dev.sora.protohax.util.ContextUtils.readString
    17→import dev.sora.protohax.util.ContextUtils.writeString
    18→
    19→class TabSetting<T : TabChoice>(override val name: Int, val key: String,
    20→                                 val default: T, val choices: Array<T>,
    21→                                 override val restartRequired: Boolean = false) : ISetting<T> {
    22→
    23→        override val description: Int
    24→                get() = name
    25→
    26→        @Composable
    27→        override fun Draw(restartRequiredCallback: () -> Unit) {
    28→                val mContext = LocalContext.current
    29→                var value by remember { mutableStateOf(getValue(mContext)) }
    30→                var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    31→
    32→                SettingsTab(
    33→                        name = name, description = value.displayName,
    34→                        modifier = Modifier
    35→                                .clickable {
    36→                                        expanded = true
    37→                                },
    38→                        extraPadding = false
    39→                ) {
    40→                        DropdownMenu(
    41→                                expanded = expanded,
    42→                                onDismissRequest = { expanded = false }
    43→                        ) {
    44→                                choices.forEach { choice ->
    45→                                        DropdownMenuItem(
    46→                                                text = { Text(stringResource(id = choice.displayName)) },
    47→                                                onClick = {
    48→                                                        expanded = false
    49→                                                        value = choice
    50→                                                        setValue(mContext, choice)
    51→                                                }
    52→                                        )
    53→                                }
    54→                        }
    55→                }
    56→        }
    57→
    58→        override fun getValue(context: Context): T {
    59→                val record = context.readString(key) ?: return default
    60→                return choices.find { it.internalName == record } ?: default
    61→        }
    62→
    63→        override fun setValue(context: Context, value: T) {
    64→                context.writeString(key, value.internalName)
    65→        }
    66→}
    67→
    68→interface TabChoice {
    69→
    70→        val displayName: Int
    71→        val internalName: String
    72→}
    73→

     1→package dev.sora.protohax.ui.overlay
     2→
     3→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
     4→import android.app.Service
     5→import android.content.Context
     6→import android.graphics.*
     7→import android.hardware.input.InputManager
     8→import android.os.Build
     9→import android.view.GestureDetector
    10→import android.view.Gravity
    11→import android.view.MotionEvent
    12→import android.view.View
    13→import android.view.WindowManager
    14→import dev.sora.protohax.R
    15→import dev.sora.protohax.ui.components.screen.settings.Settings
    16→import dev.sora.protohax.util.ContextUtils.getColor
    17→import dev.sora.relay.game.GameSession
    18→import dev.sora.relay.game.event.*
    19→
    20→
    21→@SuppressLint("ClickableViewAccessibility")
    22→class RenderLayerView(ctx: Context, private val windowManager: WindowManager, private val session: GameSession) : View(ctx) {
    23→
    24→        private val listener = EventHook(EventRefreshRender::class.java, handler = {
    25→                postInvalidate()
    26→        })
    27→
    28→        var editMode: Boolean = false
    29→        val params: WindowManager.LayoutParams
    30→
    31→        init {
    32→            session.eventManager.register(listener)
    33→
    34→                params = WindowManager.LayoutParams(
    35→                        WindowManager.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
    36→                        WindowManager.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
    37→                        WindowManager.LayoutParams.TYPE_APPLICATION_OVERLAY,
    38→                        WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_FOCUSABLE or WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_TOUCHABLE or WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_LAYOUT_IN_SCREEN,
    39→                        PixelFormat.TRANSLUCENT
    40→                )
    41→                // android introduced so called "untrusted clicks" to protect user from fraud applications
    42→                // this security feature affects ProtoHax
    43→                // https://developer.android.com/about/versions/12/behavior-changes-all#untrusted-touch-events
    44→                if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.S && !Settings.trustClicks.getValue(ctx)) {
    45→                        params.alpha = (ctx.getSystemService(Service.INPUT_SERVICE) as? InputManager)?.maximumObscuringOpacityForTouch ?: 0.8f
    46→                }
    47→                params.gravity = Gravity.TOP or Gravity.END
    48→
    49→                val gestureDetector = GestureDetector(context, object : GestureDetector.SimpleOnGestureListener() {
    50→                        override fun onDown(e: MotionEvent): Boolean {
    51→                                return true
    52→                        }
    53→
    54→                        override fun onSingleTapUp(e: MotionEvent): Boolean {
    55→                                session.eventManager.emit(EventRenderLayerClick(session, e, this@RenderLayerView))
    56→                                if (e.y > height - 150 && e.x < 150f) {
    57→                                        quitEdit()
    58→                                }
    59→                                return true
    60→                        }
    61→                })
    62→
    63→                setOnTouchListener { _, event ->
    64→                        gestureDetector.onTouchEvent(event)
    65→                        val sessionEvent = EventRenderLayerMotion(session, event, this@RenderLayerView)
    66→                        session.eventManager.emit(sessionEvent)
    67→                        if (sessionEvent.hasHandled) {
    68→                                invalidate()
    69→                        }
    70→
    71→                        true
    72→                }
    73→
    74→                windowManager.addView(this, params)
    75→        }
    76→
    77→        fun edit() {
    78→                if (editMode) return
    79→
    80→                params.flags = WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_FOCUSABLE or WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_LAYOUT_IN_SCREEN
    81→                windowManager.updateViewLayout(this, params)
    82→                editMode = true
    83→
    84→                invalidate()
    85→        }
    86→
    87→        fun quitEdit() {
    88→                if (!editMode) return
    89→
    90→                params.flags = WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_FOCUSABLE or WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_TOUCHABLE or WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_LAYOUT_IN_SCREEN
    91→                windowManager.updateViewLayout(this, params)
    92→                editMode = false
    93→
    94→                invalidate()
    95→        }
    96→
    97→    @SuppressLint("DrawAllocation")
    98→    override fun onDraw(canvas: Canvas) {
    99→        super.onDraw(canvas)
   100→
   101→        val event = EventRender(session, canvas, editMode)
   102→        session.eventManager.emit(event)
   103→        if (event.needRefresh) {
   104→            invalidate()
   105→        }
   106→
   107→                if (editMode) {
   108→                        drawQuitEditButton(canvas)
   109→                }
   110→    }
   111→
   112→        private fun drawQuitEditButton(canvas: Canvas) {
   113→                val corners = floatArrayOf(
   114→                        0f, 0f,   // Top left radius in px
   115→                        25f, 25f,   // Top right radius in px
   116→                        0f, 0f,     // Bottom right radius in px
   117→                        0f, 0f      // Bottom left radius in px
   118→                )
   119→
   120→                val path = Path()
   121→                val rect = RectF(0f, height - 150f, 150f, height.toFloat())
   122→                path.addRoundRect(rect, corners, Path.Direction.CW)
   123→                canvas.drawPath(path, Paint().apply {
   124→                        color = if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.S) {
   125→                                context.getColor(context.getColor(android.R.color.system_accent1_600, android.R.color.system_accent1_200))
   126→                        } else context.getColor(Color.rgb(103, 80, 164), Color.rgb(208, 188, 255))
   127→                })
   128→
   129→                val icon = resources.getDrawable(R.drawable.mdi_arrow_back, context.theme)
   130→                icon.setBounds(rect.left.toInt() + 30, rect.top.toInt() + 30, rect.right.toInt() - 30, rect.bottom.toInt() - 30)
   131→                icon.setTint(if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.S) {
   132→                        context.getColor(context.getColor(android.R.color.system_accent1_0, android.R.color.system_accent1_800))
   133→                } else context.getColor(Color.rgb(255, 255, 255), Color.rgb(56, 30, 114)))
   134→                icon.draw(canvas)
   135→        }
   136→
   137→        fun destroy() {
   138→                // detach event listener
   139→                session.eventManager.removeHandler(listener)
   140→                windowManager.removeView(this)
   141→        }
   142→
   143→    class EventRender(session: GameSession, val canvas: Canvas, val editMode: Boolean, var needRefresh: Boolean = false) : GameEvent(session, "render")
   144→
   145→    /**
   146→     * notify the render layer to refresh at next frame
   147→     * it won't refresh unless you don't call this event or set [needRefresh] to true in [EventRefreshRender]
   148→     */
   149→    class EventRefreshRender(session: GameSession) : GameEvent(session, "refresh_render")
   150→
   151→        class EventRenderLayerClick(session: GameSession, val event: MotionEvent, val view: RenderLayerView) : GameEvent(session, "render_click")
   152→
   153→        class EventRenderLayerMotion(session: GameSession, val event: MotionEvent, val view: RenderLayerView, var hasHandled: Boolean = false) : GameEvent(session, "render_motion")
   154→}

    64→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class, ExperimentalFoundationApi::class)
    65→@Composable
    66→fun CheatCategoryTab(
    67→        category: CheatCategory,
    68→        modules: SnapshotStateMap<CheatModule, Boolean>,
    69→        expandModules: SnapshotStateList<CheatModule>,
    70→        overlayManager: OverlayManager
    71→) {
    72→        LazyColumn(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
    73→                item {
    74→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(10.dp))
    75→                }
    76→                items(modules.keys.filter { it.category == category }.sortedBy { it.name }) { module ->
    77→                        val expand = expandModules.contains(module)
    78→                        Card(
    79→                                colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = animateColorAsState(targetValue = if (expand) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.inversePrimary).value),
    80→                                modifier = Modifier
    81→                                        .fillMaxWidth()
    82→                                        .padding(15.dp, 7.dp),
    83→                                onClick = {
    84→                                        if (expand) {
    85→                                                expandModules.remove(module)
    86→                                        } else {
    87→                                                expandModules.add(module)
    88→                                        }
    89→                                }
    90→                        ) {
    91→                                Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(PaddingValues(13.dp, 3.dp, 13.dp, if (expand) 13.dp else 3.dp))) {
    92→                                        Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()) {
    93→                                                Text(
    94→                                                        text = module.name,
    95→                                                        fontWeight = if (expand) FontWeight.Bold else null,
    96→                                                        modifier = Modifier
    97→                                                                .fillMaxWidth()
    98→                                                                .padding(0.dp, 0.dp, 60.dp, 0.dp)
    99→                                                                .basicMarquee(iterations = Int.MAX_VALUE)
   100→                                                                .align(Alignment.CenterStart)
   101→                                                )
   102→                                                Switch(
   103→                                                        checked = module.state,
   104→                                                        modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.CenterEnd),
   105→                                                        onCheckedChange = {
   106→                                                                module.state = it
   107→                                                        },
   108→                                                        colors = if (module.canToggle) {
   109→                                                                SwitchDefaults.colors(checkedBorderColor = animateColorAsState(targetValue = if (expand) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outlineVariant else Color.Transparent).value)
   110→                                                        } else {
   111→                                                                SwitchDefaults.colors(
   112→                                                                        uncheckedThumbColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.38f).compositeOver(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface),
   113→                                                                        uncheckedTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.12f).compositeOver(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface),
   114→                                                                        uncheckedBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.12f).compositeOver(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface),
   115→                                                                        uncheckedIconColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.38f).compositeOver(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface),
   116→                                                                )
   117→                                                        }
   118→                                                )
   119→                                        }
   120→                                        AnimatedVisibility(visible = expand, modifier = Modifier.clickableNoRipple { }) {
   121→                                                Box {
   122→                                                        val recomposeTrigger = remember { mutableStateOf(0) }
   123→                                                        Text(text = "${recomposeTrigger.value}", color = Color.Transparent)
   124→                                                        val recomposeTriggerFunc = {
   125→                                                                recomposeTrigger.value = if (recomposeTrigger.value == Int.MAX_VALUE) {
   126→                                                                        Int.MIN_VALUE
   127→                                                                } else {
   128→                                                                        recomposeTrigger.value + 1
   129→                                                                }
   130→                                                        }
   131→                                                        Column {
   132→                                                                module.values.forEach { value ->
   133→                                                                        if (value.isVisibilityVariable) {
   134→                                                                                AnimatedVisibility(visible = value.visible) {
   135→                                                                                        Column {
   136→                                                                                                CheatValue(value, recomposeTriggerFunc)
   137→                                                                                        }
   138→                                                                                }
   139→                                                                        } else {
   140→                                                                                CheatValue(value, recomposeTriggerFunc)
   141→                                                                        }
   142→                                                                }
   143→                                                                CheatShortcut(module, recomposeTriggerFunc, overlayManager)
   144→                                                        }
   145→                                                }
   146→                                        }
   147→                                }
   148→                        }
   149→                }
   150→                item {
   151→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(10.dp))
   152→                }
   153→        }
   154→}
   155→
   156→@OptIn(ExperimentalFoundationApi::class)
   157→@Composable
   158→private fun CheatShortcut(
   159→        module: CheatModule, recomposeTrigger: () -> Unit,
   160→        overlayManager: OverlayManager
   161→) {
   162→        Row(
   163→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   164→                modifier = Modifier
   165→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   166→                        .height(30.dp)
   167→        ) {
   168→                Text(text = "Shortcut", modifier = Modifier.basicMarquee(iterations = Int.MAX_VALUE))
   169→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
   170→                Checkbox(
   171→                        checked = overlayManager.hasShortcut(module),
   172→                        onCheckedChange = {
   173→                                if (overlayManager.hasShortcut(module)) {
   174→                                        overlayManager.removeShortcut(module)
   175→                                } else {
   176→                                        overlayManager.addShortcut(Shortcut(module, overlayManager))
   177→                                }
   178→                                recomposeTrigger()
   179→                        },
   180→                        colors = CheckboxDefaults.colors(checkedColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary, uncheckedColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary, checkmarkColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary)
   181→                )
   182→        }
   183→}
   184→
   185→@OptIn(ExperimentalFoundationApi::class)
   186→@Composable
   187→fun CheatValue(value: Value<*>, recomposeTrigger: () -> Unit) {
   188→        if (value is BoolValue) {
   189→                Row(
   190→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   191→                        modifier = Modifier
   192→                                .fillMaxWidth()
   193→                                .height(30.dp)
   194→                ) {
   195→                        Text(text = value.name, modifier = Modifier.basicMarquee(iterations = Int.MAX_VALUE))
   196→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
   197→                        Checkbox(
   198→                                checked = value.value,
   199→                                onCheckedChange = {
   200→                                        value.value = it
   201→                                        recomposeTrigger()
   202→                                },
   203→                                colors = CheckboxDefaults.colors(checkedColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary, uncheckedColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary, checkmarkColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary)
   204→                        )
   205→                }
   206→        } else if (value is IntValue || value is FloatValue) {
   207→                Row(modifier = Modifier.padding(0.dp, 5.dp, 0.dp, 0.dp), verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   208→                        Text(text = value.name, modifier = Modifier.basicMarquee(iterations = Int.MAX_VALUE))
   209→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
   210→                        Text(text = if (value.value is Float) {
   211→                                String.format("%.2f", value.value)
   212→                        } else value.value.toString())
   213→                }
   214→                val colors = SliderDefaults.colors(
   215→                        thumbColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   216→                        activeTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   217→                        inactiveTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline,
   218→                )
   219→                if (value is IntValue) {
   220→                        Slider(
   221→                                value = value.value.toFloat(),
   222→                                valueRange = value.range.toFloatRange(),
   223→                                onValueChange = {
   224→                                        value.value = it.roundToInt()
   225→                                        recomposeTrigger()
   226→                                },
   227→                                colors = colors,
   228→                                modifier = Modifier.height(25.dp)
   229→                        )
   230→                } else if (value is FloatValue) { // use kotlin smart cast
   231→                        Slider(
   232→                                value = value.value,
   233→                                valueRange = value.range,
   234→                                onValueChange = {
   235→                                        value.value = it
   236→                                        recomposeTrigger()
   237→                                },
   238→                                colors = colors,
   239→                                modifier = Modifier.height(25.dp)
   240→                        )
   241→                }
   242→        } else if (value is IntRangeValue) {
   243→                Row(modifier = Modifier.padding(0.dp, 5.dp, 0.dp, 0.dp), verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   244→                        Text(text = value.name, modifier = Modifier.basicMarquee(iterations = Int.MAX_VALUE))
   245→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
   246→                        Text(text = "${value.value.first}..${value.value.last}")
   247→                }
   248→                RangeSlider(
   249→                        value = value.value.toFloatRange(),
   250→                        valueRange = value.range.toFloatRange(),
   251→                        onValueChange = {
   252→                                value.value = it.start.roundToInt()..it.endInclusive.roundToInt()
   253→                                recomposeTrigger()
   254→                        },
   255→                        colors = SliderDefaults.colors(
   256→                                thumbColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   257→                                activeTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   258→                                inactiveTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline,
   259→                        ),
   260→                        modifier = Modifier.height(25.dp)
   261→                )
   262→        } else if (value is ListValue) {
   263→                Text(
   264→                        text = value.name,
   265→                        modifier = Modifier
   266→                                .padding(0.dp, 5.dp)
   267→                                .basicMarquee(iterations = Int.MAX_VALUE)
   268→                )
   269→                Row(
   270→                        modifier = Modifier
   271→                                .horizontalScroll(rememberScrollState())
   272→                                .fillMaxWidth()
   273→                ) {
   274→                        value.values.forEach {
   275→                                val name = if (it is NamedChoice) it.choiceName else it.toString()
   276→                                val selected = value.value == it
   277→                                AssistChip(
   278→                                        modifier = Modifier
   279→                                                .padding(3.dp, 2.dp)
   280→                                                .height(30.dp),
   281→                                        onClick = {
   282→                                                value.fromString(name)
   283→                                                recomposeTrigger()
   284→                                        },
   285→                                        label = {
   286→                                                Text(
   287→                                                        text = name,
   288→                                                        style = TextStyle(fontSize = 14.sp)
   289→                                                )
   290→                                        },
   291→                                        colors = AssistChipDefaults.elevatedAssistChipColors(
   292→                                                containerColor = animateColorAsState(targetValue = if (selected) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline).value,
   293→                                                labelColor = animateColorAsState(targetValue = if (selected) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary else Color.LightGray).value,
   294→                                        ),
   295→                                        border = null
   296→                                )
   297→                        }
   298→                }
   299→        } else if (value is StringValue) {
   300→                Text(text = value.name)
   301→                TextField(
   302→                        value = value.value,
   303→                        onValueChange = {
   304→                                value.value = it
   305→                                recomposeTrigger()
   306→                        },
   307→                        singleLine = true,
   308→                        modifier = Modifier
   309→                                .fillMaxWidth()
   310→                                .padding(0.dp, 0.dp, 0.dp, 10.dp),
   311→                        colors = OutlinedTextFieldDefaults.colors(
   312→                                focusedTextColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   313→                                unfocusedTextColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer,
   314→                                focusedBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   315→                                unfocusedBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer,
   316→                                focusedLabelColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   317→                                unfocusedLabelColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer,
   318→                        )
   319→                )
   320→        }
   321→}
   322→
   323→
   324→private fun IntRange.toFloatRange()
   325→        = first.toFloat()..last.toFloat()
   326→

    11→class TextElement : HudElement(HudManager.TEXT_ELEMENT_IDENTIFIER) {
    12→
    13→        private val textElementDefault = "Hello world!"
    14→
    15→        private var textValue by stringValue("Text", textElementDefault).listen {
    16→                this.width = paint.measureText(it)
    17→                it
    18→        }
    19→        private var colorRedValue by intValue("ColorRed", 255, 0..255)
    20→        private var colorGreenValue by intValue("ColorGreen", 255, 0..255)
    21→        private var colorBlueValue by intValue("ColorBlue", 255, 0..255)
    22→        private var textSizeValue by intValue("TextSize", 20, 10..50).listen {
    23→                paint.textSize = it * MyApplication.density
    24→                height = paint.fontMetrics.let { m -> m.descent - m.ascent }
    25→                it
    26→        }
    27→
    28→        private val paint = TextPaint().also {
    29→                it.color = Color.WHITE
    30→                it.isAntiAlias = true
    31→                it.textSize = 20 * MyApplication.density
    32→        }
    33→
    34→        override var height = paint.fontMetrics.let { it.descent - it.ascent }
    35→                private set
    36→        override var width = paint.measureText(textElementDefault)
    37→                private set
    38→
    39→        override fun onRender(canvas: Canvas, editMode: Boolean, needRefresh: AtomicBoolean) {
    40→                paint.color = Color.rgb(colorRedValue, colorGreenValue, colorBlueValue)
    41→
    42→                canvas.drawText(textValue, 0f, -paint.fontMetrics.ascent, paint)
    43→        }
    44→}

arguments.content:
# Objective
Corrigir erros, modernizar dependências, adicionar mais funções/opções e melhorar a interface gráfica do ProtoHax-Android.

## Tasks

### T001: Modernizar build e dependências
- **Blocked By**: []
- **Details**:
  - Atualizar AGP, Kotlin, Compose para versões mais recentes compatíveis
  - Corrigir Theme.kt (remover deprecated systemuicontroller)
  - Corrigir imports faltantes em Clickable.kt
  - Arquivos: build.gradle, app/build.gradle, Theme.kt, Clickable.kt

### T002: Corrigir erros de código e formatação
- **Blocked By**: [T001]
- **Details**:
  - Corrigir indentação inconsistente nos arquivos principais
  - Corrigir imports e referências quebradas
  - Adicionar null-safety onde faltante
  - Arquivos: DashboardScreen.kt, ConfigScreen.kt, AccountsScreen.kt, MainActivity.kt

### T003: Melhorar Dashboard com mais funcionalidades
- **Blocked By**: [T002]
- **Details**:
  - Adicionar status visual de conexão com indicador animado
  - Adicionar estatísticas de rede (ping, pacotes, velocidade)
  - Adicionar card de informações do app alvo com mais dados
  - Adicionar card de logs recentes
  - Melhorar visual com cards coloridos e animações
  - Arquivos: DashboardScreen.kt, DashboardCards.kt, strings.xml

### T004: Expandir Settings com mais opções
- **Blocked By**: [T002]
- **Details**:
  - Adicionar configuração manual de tema (Dark/Light/Auto)
  - Adicionar configuração de notificações
  - Adicionar configuração de porta do relay
  - Adicionar configuração de MTU
  - Adicionar configuração de timeout
  - Criar IntSetting.kt, ThemeSetting.kt
  - Arquivos: Settings.kt, SettingsScreen.kt, BoolSetting.kt, strings.xml

### T005: Melhorar UI geral e navegação
- **Blocked By**: [T003, T004]
- **Details**:
  - Melhorar cores do tema com paleta customizada
  - Adicionar animações de entrada/saída mais suaves
  - Melhorar visual do overlay/menu
  - Adicionar splash screen animado
  - Arquivos: Theme.kt, PHaxApp.kt, NavigationComponents.kt, ConfigureMenu.kt

### T006: Adicionar funções extras
- **Blocked By**: [T003, T004]
- **Details**:
  - Adicionar botão de reload configs no ConfigScreen
  - Adicionar exportação de todas configs
  - Adicionar filtro/busca de configs
  - Adicionar backup automático de configs
  - Adicionar atalhos de teclado para módulos populares

     1→package dev.sora.protohax.ui.components
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.foundation.text.ClickableText
     4→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
     5→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
     6→import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
     7→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalUriHandler
     8→import androidx.compose.ui.text.SpanStyle
     9→import androidx.compose.ui.text.TextStyle
    10→import androidx.compose.ui.text.buildAnnotatedString
    11→import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
    12→import androidx.compose.ui.text.style.TextDecoration
    13→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.TextUnit
    14→
    15→@Composable
    16→fun HyperlinkText(
    17→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
    18→    fullText: String,
    19→    hyperLinks: Map<String, String>,
    20→    textStyle: TextStyle = TextStyle.Default,
    21→    linkTextColor: Color = Color.Blue,
    22→    linkTextFontWeight: FontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
    23→    linkTextDecoration: TextDecoration = TextDecoration.None,
    24→    fontSize: TextUnit = TextUnit.Unspecified
    25→) {
    26→    val annotatedString = buildAnnotatedString {
    27→        append(fullText)
    28→
    29→        for((key, value) in hyperLinks){
    30→            val startIndex = fullText.indexOf(key)
    31→            val endIndex = startIndex + key.length
    32→            addStyle(
    33→                style = SpanStyle(
    34→                    color = linkTextColor,
    35→                    fontSize = fontSize,
    36→                    fontWeight = linkTextFontWeight,
    37→                    textDecoration = linkTextDecoration
    38→                ),
    39→                start = startIndex,
    40→                end = endIndex
    41→            )
    42→            addStringAnnotation(
    43→                tag = "URL",
    44→                annotation = value,
    45→                start = startIndex,
    46→                end = endIndex
    47→            )
    48→        }
    49→        addStyle(
    50→            style = SpanStyle(
    51→                fontSize = fontSize
    52→            ),
    53→            start = 0,
    54→            end = fullText.length
    55→        )
    56→    }
    57→
    58→    val uriHandler = LocalUriHandler.current
    59→
    60→    ClickableText(
    61→        modifier = modifier,
    62→        text = annotatedString,
    63→        style = textStyle,
    64→        onClick = {
    65→            annotatedString
    66→                .getStringAnnotations("URL", it, it)
    67→                .firstOrNull()?.let { stringAnnotation ->
    68→                    uriHandler.openUri(stringAnnotation.item)
    69→                }
    70→        }
    71→    )
    72→}

Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of app/src/main/java/dev/sora/protohax/ui/overlay/ConfigSectionShortcut.kt
     1→package dev.sora.protohax.ui.overlay
     2→
     3→import com.google.gson.JsonArray
     4→import com.google.gson.JsonElement
     5→import com.google.gson.JsonObject
     6→import dev.sora.protohax.relay.MinecraftRelay
     7→import dev.sora.relay.cheat.config.section.IConfigSection
     8→import dev.sora.relay.utils.asJsonObjectOrNull
     9→
    10→class ConfigSectionShortcut(private val overlayManager: OverlayManager) : IConfigSection {
    11→
    12→        override fun load(element: JsonElement?) {
    13→                overlayManager.shortcuts.forEach {
    14→                        overlayManager.removeShortcut(it.module)
    15→                }
    16→
    17→                element ?: return
    18→                if (!element.isJsonArray) {
    19→                        return
    20→                }
    21→                val array = element.asJsonArray
    22→
    23→                array.forEach { obj ->
    24→                        val json = obj.asJsonObjectOrNull ?: return@forEach
    25→                        if (!json.has("module")) {
    26→                                return@forEach
    27→                        }
    28→                        val module = MinecraftRelay.moduleManager.modules.find { it.name == json.get("module").asString } ?: return@forEach
    29→                        val shortcut = Shortcut(module, overlayManager)
    30→                        if (json.has("x")) {
    31→                                shortcut.params.x = json.get("x").asInt
    32→                        }
    33→                        if (json.has("y")) {
    34→                                shortcut.params.y = json.get("y").asInt
    35→                        }
    36→
    37→                        overlayManager.addShortcut(shortcut)
    38→                }
    39→        }
    40→
    41→        override fun save(): JsonArray {
    42→                val array = JsonArray()
    43→
    44→                overlayManager.shortcuts.forEach { shortcut ->
    45→                        val json = JsonObject()
    46→
    47→                        json.addProperty("module", shortcut.module.name)
    48→                        json.addProperty("x", shortcut.params.x)
    49→                        json.addProperty("y", shortcut.params.y)
    50→
    51→                        array.add(json)
    52→                }
    53→
    54→                return array
    55→        }
    56→
    57→        override val sectionName: String
    58→                get() = "shortcut"
    59→}
    60→
